summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Raghav Mittal & Associates CA firm API (auth + blog CRUD + contact). All 28 tests passed (100%). Verified cookie-based JWT auth (httpOnly access_token & refresh_token), 401 enforcement on admin endpoints, blog public + admin CRUD flow with slug regeneration on title change, contact form submission and admin contact management.

minor.issue: Cookies use secure=False and samesite='lax'. Works for current preview env but should use secure=True + samesite='none' in production for cross-site cookie support.
allow_origin_regex='.*' + allow_credentials=True effectively reflects any origin, which weakens CSRF protection. Consider restricting to explicit origins in production.
No brute-force lockout / rate-limit implemented (5-fail lockout requested in playbook test instructions is missing).
Unused imports: Annotated, ConfigDict, BeforeValidator in server.py

action_items: (Optional) Add brute-force lockout to /api/auth/login (5 failed attempts) if playbook compliance required.
(Optional) For prod deployment, set cookie secure=True and samesite='none', and replace CORS regex with explicit origin list.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth correctly uses bcrypt (functional - login verified) and JWT in httpOnly cookies. Good.
seed_admin is idempotent and updates password hash if changed - matches playbook recommendation.
Slug uniqueness handled with uuid suffix on collision - good.
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded via serialize_* helpers - no _id leaks in responses.
Admin endpoints use Depends(get_current_user) consistently - returns 401 when unauthenticated as designed.
Pydantic validation works for contact form (422 on missing/invalid email).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeded admin user + 6 blog posts on startup. Tests created/deleted temporary TEST_ blog posts and contact submissions; cleaned up after themselves.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional at https://financial-trust-7.preview.emergentagent.com. Cookie-based auth via /api/auth/login (httpOnly). Use admin@raghavmittal.com / admin123. 6 seeded blog posts. Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v` for regression.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all backend endpoints behaving as specified.
